title: Jerusalem Artichoke Bourguignon
description: A rich and comforting French stew made with tender artichokes, beef, and vegetables, cooked in a flavorful red wine broth.

ingredients.name: Beef, Chuck
ingredients.notes: 1.1 lb beef chuck, cut into 2-inch pieces

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Brown the beef in batches, then set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onion, carrot, and celery until tender.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine and bring to a boil, scraping up browned bits.
Add the beef broth, tomato paste, and browned beef. Stir to combine.
Add the artichokes and thyme. Season with salt and pepper.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven. Braise for 2.5 hours, or until the artichokes are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
